prestazioni: K24W8 engine (2.0L turbocharged VTEC direct-injection) upgraded with a Garrett GT3076R turbocharger (0.86 A/R, 62mm inducer) paired with a custom 3.5-inch titanium downpipe by HKS, featuring a 4-inch catted section for optimized spool and flow while maintaining emissions compliance for track-day use.

Full PRL Motorsports Stage 3 long-block build with forged Mahle 9.5:1 pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft, mated to a K-Tuned billet oil pump and ARP Custom Age 625+ head studs for 35+ psi boost capability, supporting 500+ WHP on E85.

Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with 8-position adjustable damping, custom valving for the FK8 chassis, and spherical bearing top mounts by Hardrace, paired with a full Whiteline front sway bar (24mm adjustable) and rear sway bar (22mm) to eliminate body roll during high-G cornering on Nürburgring-style circuits.
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS widebody kit (FK8-specific) with carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a duckbill rear spoiler, extending track width by 50mm per side for aggressive stance and improved tire clearance with 275/30R19 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires on Volk Racing TE37V wheels (19x9.5 +22 front, 19x10.5 +30 rear).

Seibon Carbon fiber hood with a 30mm vented heat extractor and integrated carbon fiber canards by Varis Japan, reducing front-end lift by 15% at 120 mph while maintaining OEM-level panel gaps for a stealth appearance.

Full custom interior by Recaro with SPG XL seats (FK8-specific mounting brackets) upholstered in Alcantara and red Nappa leather, paired with a MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (350mm, suede) and a custom titanium shift knob by 3D Carbon, replacing the OEM shift lever for reduced weight and improved ergonomics.
